originalTitle: Verizon’s ‘Simplicity’ flat-rate plan starts at $30 per month for new customers
summary: Verizon is launching a new Simplicity plan that starts at $30 / month for new customers, or $45 / month for existing ones. In its announcement, Verizon says the plan drops activation and upgrade fees, while offering one flat price for each line. The $30 price for new customers is an "initial promotional offer" that […]
content: Verizon is launching a new Simplicity plan that starts at $30 / month for new customers, or $45 / month for existing ones. In its announcement, Verizon says the plan drops activation and upgrade fees, while offering one flat price for each line. The $30 price for new customers is an “initial promotional offer” that applies after enabling autopay and taking advantage of a discount for switching carriers, according to Verizon. But before customers can ditch Verizon’s $40 fee to activate or upgrade a device, they’ll need to opt in to the carrier’s new loyalty program through the My Verizon app. The loyalty program comes with a new Verizon Dollars perk, which offers 3 percent cash back on your bill each month, as well as a Verizon Shine benefit with access to ticket sales, sweepstakes, and giveaways. [Image: https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/verizon-simplicity-plan.png?quality=90&strip=all] The Simplicity plan includes unlimited access to Verizon’s 5G ultrawideband network, 10GB of mobile hotspot data, roaming in Canada and Mexico, and satellite texting on devices with the feature. Customers can tack on a home internet plan for $35 per month, as well as bundle streaming services like Netflix, Disney Plus, Hulu, and HBO Max at an added cost. Verizon notes that customers can “continue to enjoy” perks offered through myPlan. “For too long, this industry has burdened people with complex plans, forced upgrades they don’t need, and so-called ‘rewards’ with tons of caveats,” Verizon CEO Dan Schulman said in the press release. Schulman became CEO of Verizon last year  as the carrier entered what board chair Mark Bertolini described as Verizon’s “next phase of increased customer focus.” Along with the Simplicity plan, the carrier announced a Verizon One subscription that combines unlimited 5G connectivity and home internet service for $70 per month. While this plan is only available to new Verizon customers, the company says existing customers can still benefit from its Mobile + Home discount.
chineseTitle: Verizon 的“Simplicity”统一费率计划新客户起价为每月 30 美元
chineseSummary: Verizon 正在推出一项新的 Simplicity 计划，新客户起价为 30 美元/月，现有客户起价为 45 美元/月。 Verizon 在其声明中表示，该计划降低了激活费和升级费，同时为每条线路提供统一价格。新客户 30 美元的价格是“初始促销优惠”，[...]
chineseContent: Verizon 正在推出一项新的 Simplicity 计划，新客户起价为 30 美元/月，现有客户起价为 45 美元/月。 Verizon 在其声明中表示，该计划降低了激活费和升级费，同时为每条线路提供统一价格。据 Verizon 称，新客户 30 美元的价格是“初始促销优惠”，在启用自动付款并享受更换运营商折扣后适用。但在客户放弃 Verizon 的 40 美元激活或升级设备费用之前，他们需要通过 My Verizon 应用程序选择加入该运营商的新忠诚度计划。该忠诚度计划附带新的 Verizon Dollars 福利，每月为您的账单提供 3% 的现金返还，以及 Verizon Shine 福利，包括门票销售、抽奖和赠品。 [图片：https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/verizon-simplicity-plan.png?quality=90&strip=all] Simplicity 计划包括无限制地访问 Verizon 的 5G 超宽带网络、10GB 移动热点数据、在加拿大和墨西哥漫游以及在具有该功能的设备上发送卫星短信。客户可以选择每月 35 美元的家庭互联网套餐，以及额外付费的 Netflix、Disney Plus、Hulu 和 HBO Max 等捆绑流媒体服务。 Verizon 指出，客户可以“继续享受”通过 myPlan 提供的福利。 Verizon 首席执行官 Dan Schulman 在新闻稿中表示：“长期以来，这个行业给人们带来了复杂的计划、他们不需要的强制升级以及带有大量警告的所谓‘奖励’。”舒尔曼去年成为 Verizon 的首席执行官，当时该运营商进入了董事会主席马克·贝尔托里尼 (Mark Bertolini) 所说的 Verizon“更加注重客户关注的下一阶段”。除了 Simplicity 计划之外，该运营商还宣布了 Veriz
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
